title: Durability Alert - Continued
description: Durability Alert Continued is a plugin that notifies the player when their items are low on durability. It works for: All armour, Pickaxes, Axes, Shovels, Swords, Hoes, Fishing Rod, Shears.
body:
# 🛡️ Durability Alert – Continued

![Durability Alert Banner](https://github.com/shantek/DurabilityAlert-Continued/raw/master/.github/assets/DA_Banner.png)

A lightweight alert system that notifies players when their armor or tools are low on durability. Configurable per player, with full control over thresholds and sound cues.

> 💡 **Continued and maintained with permission** from the original author, [christopherwalkerml](https://github.com/christopherwalkerml/DurabilityAlert).

---

## 🔍 Features

- Alerts when armor or tools fall below a durability threshold  
- Supports percentage **or** raw durability modes  
- Works with: Armor, Tools, Swords, Hoes, Fishing Rods, Shears  
- Toggle alerts only for **enchanted** items  
- Enable/disable **sound alerts**  
- Per-player settings saved between sessions  
- Fully customizable messages and thresholds  

---

## 📦 Installation

1. Download the latest `.jar` file. 
2. Place it in your server’s `/plugins` folder.  
3. Restart or reload your server.  
4. Players can begin customizing their alerts with `/da`.  

---

## 🧪 Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/durabilityalert` or `/da` | Base command; shows info or help. |
| `/da toggle` | Toggles alerts on/off for the player. |
| `/da armour <value>` | Set armor alert threshold. |
| `/da tools <value>` | Set tool alert threshold. |
| `/da type [percent/durability]` | Switch between percentage or raw value. |
| `/da enchant` | Toggle alerts only for enchanted gear. |
| `/da sound` | Toggle sound alerts. |

---

## 🔐 Permissions

| Node | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `shantek.durabilityalert.use` | Allow players to use and configure alerts. |
| `shantek.durabilityalert.reload` | Allow config reload (default: OP only). |

---

## 📣 Support & Community

- 💬 [Join our Discord](https://shantek.co/discord)  
- 🛠️ [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/shantek/DurabilityAlert-Continued)
